channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: How Congress will certify Trump's Electoral College victory on Jan. 6
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The congressional joint session to count electoral votes on Monday is expected to be much less eventful than the certification four years ago that was interrupted by a violent mob of supporters of then-President Donald Trump who tried to stop the count and overturn the results of a
item.dc:creator: MARY CLARE JALONICK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: House Speaker Mike Johnson held onto his job, but there are signs of trouble ahead
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — This time was supposed to be different. But while House Speaker Mike Johnson on Friday avoided the dayslong ordeal that his predecessor, Kevin McCarthy, endured to become speaker, his relatively swift victory was hardly a unifying moment.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN GROVES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: A user’s manual to certifying the presidential election
item.description: After Mike Johnson wins reelection The House and Senate will meet on Monday in a Joint Session of Congress to certify the results of the 2024 presidential vote.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: House votes for rules to make ousting a speaker more difficult
item.description: The House of Representatives voted along party lines to adopt a new set of rules for the 119th Congress.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump slams Merchan, Democrats, who 'just want to see if they can get a pound of flesh' amid failed cases
item.description: EXCLUSIVE: President-elect Donald Trump slammed Judge Juan Merchan for denying his request to dismiss the charges against him in New York v. Trump, telling Fox News Digital Democrats “just want to see if they can get a pound of flesh because every case has failed.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: New York judge sets Trump sentencing days before inauguration
item.description: President-elect Trump's bid to toss his conviction in his New York criminal hush money case was denied on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Federal courts won't refer Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas to attorney general over ethics
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The federal courts will not refer allegations that Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas may have violated ethics laws to the Justice Department, the judiciary's policymaking body said Thursday.
item.dc:creator: LINDSAY WHITEHURST, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Chip Roy bid for Rules chair emerges as key issue ahead of Speaker vote
item.description: Rep. Chip Roy’s (R-Texas) bid to be chair of the House Rules Committee is emerging as a key issue for those withholding support for Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) ahead of Friday afternoon’s Speaker election. Rep. Lauren Boebert (R-Colo.), who has withheld support for Johnson, told former Rep.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, NewsNation

item.title: Biden awards Medal of Honor to seven US Army soldiers
item.description: President Biden on Friday awarded the Medal of Honor to seven U.S. Army soldiers, most of whom received it posthumously for service during the Korea War, in his last ceremony as commander-in-chief awarding the country’s highest military honor.
item.dc:creator: The Hill, NewsNation

item.title: Republican Mike Johnson reelected House speaker in dramatic floor vote
item.description: Republican Mike Johnson has narrowly won reelection to the House speakership on a dramatic first-ballot vote, overcoming hard-right GOP holdouts in a tense standoff.
item.dc:creator: Lisa Mascaro, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Biden awards the 2nd highest civilian award to leaders of the Jan. 6 committee and 18 others
item.description: President Joe Biden on Thursday awarded the second highest civilian medal to Liz Cheney and Bennie Thompson, leaders of the congressional investigation into the Capitol riot who Donald Trump has said should be jailed for their roles in the inquiry.
item.dc:creator: COLLEEN LONG and DARLENE SUPERVILLE, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Sanders gets Finance perch to push Social Security, Medicare expansion, tax reform
item.description: Sen. Bernie Sanders (I-Vt.), who supports expanding Social Security and Medicare and raising taxes on the wealthy, will get a seat on the Senate’s powerful Finance Committee, which has jurisdiction over those big issues.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, NewsNation

item.title: Former Virginia GOP congressman forms exploratory committee for possible statewide run
item.description: Former Virginia Republican Rep. Denver Riggleman said he has formed an exploratory committee to run for statewide office as an Independent.
item.dc:creator: Julia Manchester, NewsNation

item.title: Ohio updates election forms to support transgender candidates
item.description: The change followed the disqualification of a transgender woman who failed to list legal names used in the past five years on a petition.
item.dc:creator: Taylor Delandro, NewsNation

item.title: 5 things that will shape US politics in 2025
item.description: The fallout of last month’s high-stakes election and recent battles within Congress are offering early clues of what will set the tone for politics in 2025.
item.dc:creator: Caroline Vakil, Fox 5

item.title: The top 5 education issues of 2024
item.description: Universities and state education policies dominated in 2024 with a tumultuous year that saw massive protests over the Israel-Hamas war and lawsuits over the separation of church and state in public schools.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, NewsNation

item.title: Trump says he'll attend Jimmy Carter's funeral
item.description: Asked by The Associated Press as he walked into a New Year's Eve party at his Mar-a-Lago club in Florida, Trump said "I'll be there.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, Fox 5

item.title: 7 rising Democratic leaders to watch
item.description: Democrats are scrambling for a new leader to head the party and organize resistance to President-elect Trump following Vice President Harris’s loss in November's election.
item.dc:creator: Jared Gans, Fox 5

item.title: Imperial Beach mayor vying for San Diego County Supervisor
item.description: After San Diego County Board of Supervisors Chair Nora Vargas announced her decision to vacate her position at the end of her current term, three people have announced their desire to sit in her place.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5
